comments.body:
@rhatdan PTAL.

Notice, that I didn't change the return value of `(c *Container) GetContainerPidInformation(descriptors []string) ([]string, error)` to `[][]string` but left a TODO in case we want to support filtering in the future. Otherwise, I had to change varlink (and the python client?).

:pushpin: Commit 57fa0dd has been approved by `rhatdan`
